allow: Bash(cd "/c/Projects/music_app_backend/frontend/app-frontend" && cat node_modules/shadcn/tailwind.css 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo "NOT FOUND")
PowerShell(docker inspect music-neo4j --format "{{json .State.Health}}" | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Log | Select-Object -Last 3 | ForEach-Object { $_.Output })
PowerShell(docker exec music-neo4j wget -qO /dev/null http://localhost:7474 2>&1; Write-Host "wget exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker exec music-neo4j curl -sf http://localhost:7474 2>&1; Write-Host "curl exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker exec music-neo4j cypher-shell -u neo4j -p music_pass "RETURN 1" 2>&1; Write-Host "cypher exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(kubectl get configmap grafana-dashboards-provider -n music-app -o yaml)
PowerShell(kubectl rollout restart deployment grafana -n music-app)
PowerShell(kubectl rollout status deployment grafana -n music-app --timeout=60s)

PowerShell(kubectl scale deployment gateway catalog-service user-service playlist-service library-service streaming-service search-service upload-service notification-service recommend-service -n music-app --replicas=1)
PowerShell(kubectl scale deployment catalog-service library-service playlist-service user-service -n music-app --replicas=0)
PowerShell(kubectl scale deployment catalog-service library-service playlist-service user-service -n music-app --replicas=1)
PowerShell(kubectl get pod -n music-app -l app.kubernetes.io/name=user-service -o wide)
PowerShell(kubectl exec -n music-app minio-0 -- mc alias set local http://localhost:9000 music_admin music_pass 2>$null)
PowerShell(kubectl exec -n music-app minio-0 -- mc ls local/images/artworks/ 2>$null)
PowerShell(kubectl exec -n music-app minio-0 -- mc anonymous set download local/images 2>$null)
